items.summary: Debug and fix the backend paste storage issue where paste ID 1771799269632900371 is not being found after creation. Verify that the createPaste function properly stores the paste data in the backend canister's state and that the getPaste function can retrieve it using the same ID format.

Add backend logging to the createPaste and getPaste functions to track paste ID generation, storage operations, and retrieval attempts. Log the paste ID format, storage confirmation, and any retrieval failures with diagnostic information.

Verify that the paste ID type consistency between createPaste (which returns the ID) and getPaste (which accepts the ID as parameter) matches. Ensure both functions use the same ID representation (Nat vs Text vs custom type) throughout the storage and retrieval flow.

Add frontend error handling to display detailed backend error messages when a paste is not found, including the attempted paste ID and any backend diagnostic information returned in the error response.
